message:
Add typed partial evaluation to preserve residual abstract value types

partial_eval_jaxpr_typed() accepts optional input AbstractValues and
propagates types through known equations so residual abstract values
carry correct dtype/shape (I64, Bool, tensor) instead of always
defaulting to F64 scalar. The existing partial_eval_jaxpr() delegates
to the new function with None for backwards compatibility.

Adds infer_equation_output_aval() for lightweight type inference of
equation outputs (comparisons→Bool, reductions→scalar, others pass
through input type). Two new tests verify I64 residual preservation
and comparison→Bool residual typing. 70 interpreter tests (was 68).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
